title: SPPU Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 133 Assistant Professor Posts
description: The Savitribai Phule Pune University (SPPU) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 133 Assistant Professor Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech, Ph.D., MBA, MCA, and M.Sc. can apply for the SPPU Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the educational details,...
